sourceMovie.title: Enough
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Enough works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The drama and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Gone Girl
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Enough clicked for you, Gone Girl (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Enough?
faq.answer: Try Gone Girl, Rosemary's Baby, The Gift—each shares DNA with Enough while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Enough?
faq.answer: Enough (2002) is best described as Drama, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Enough worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
